description: SHA256 migration for pnpmfile checksum + escape # in dir names cascades through crypto, dependency-path, and core packages

changed_package.name: @pnpm/crypto.hash
changed_package.change_summary: Hash algorithm migration and pnpmfile checksum support

affected_dependents.name: @pnpm/pnpmfile
affected_dependents.impact: Pnpmfile hooks updated for checksum verification with new hash algorithm

affected_dependents.name: @pnpm/dependency-path
affected_dependents.impact: Escape # character in directory names for dependency paths (PR #8557)

affected_dependents.name: pnpm (CLI)
affected_dependents.impact: CLI hooks test updated for new checksum behavior

affected_dependents.name: @pnpm/core
affected_dependents.impact: Core install test updated for repo-based installs with new path format
